message:
fix(web): remove placeholder 0.0.0 version from footer

Updated Footer component to hide version number when not explicitly
provided or when it's the placeholder '0.0.0'. Footer now shows just
"Phage Explorer" without the version suffix in production.

This follows Option A from the spec: hide placeholder in prod,
version info can be surfaced in Settings > About if needed later.

Fixes: phage_explorer-s4qx.3.8
